content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed ~5,500 lines of changes across 11 source files implementing success reconciliation. The core handler (success_reconciliation.rs, ~490 lines) correctly implements all 5 steps: idempotent br close, sync-after-close, milestone state update, best-effort bv hint capture, and task-to-bead linkage via outcome_detail. Daemon integration (daemon_loop.rs, ~450 lines of logic changes) adds post-completion retry gating, reconciliation-only retry fast-paths, workflow_run_id persistence, and proper failure-class routing. Supporting changes add task_id to TaskRunEntry/CompletionJournalDetails with backwards-compatible extraction from outcome_detail format. All 14 unit tests pass including end-to-end milestone update, stale hint deletion, replay idempotency, and the sync-failure-on-replay-is-fatal regression test. The implementation is well-reasoned with careful crash-safety analysis (sync unconditional regardless of was_already_closed), correct error escalation (BrCloseFailed/BrSyncFailed → needs-operator, MilestoneUpdateFailed → task Failed with retry path), and proper BvExitError vs BvParseError distinction for hint lifecycle. No correctness bugs, safety problems, or significant maintainability risks identified.

## Amendments

None.
